Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is Granted, with monetary sanctions awarded against defendant Calspur, Inc. in the amount of $340. The Motion is granted on the grounds set forth in the moving papers, and: (1) the Motion is not opposed; (2) defendant has not submitted any response or proposed response to the Post-Judgment Interrogatories or Demand for Production of Documents. (Moving party to submit a proposed order.) Pro Tem Judge: Katherine Huibonhoa; Not reported
